fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-default-catchall — 'weather in Tokyo'. Emits get_weather tool call. The built-in default catchall renderer fires for this tool. The D5 assertion checks copilot-tool-render testid with data-tool-name='get_weather' and a status pill. hasToolResult:false on the tool-emitting fixture.
tool-rendering-default-catchall — follow-up after get_weather tool result.

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy — the default catchall renderer should display the tool card with a status pill above.
